productName: SMC - Infused Joint 1g - Indica - Wedding Cake - 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Wedding Cake supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of vanilla, pepper, and butter, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
